# ATMA-AI

ATMA Consultancy Services (ATMA-AI) is an elite AI and IT consultancy based in New Delhi, India. We deliver custom LLM deployment, enterprise architecture, and neuro-symbolic robotics to help businesses dominate their industries. Our services are designed to bring state-of-the-art artificial intelligence solutions to production.

## Founders

- **Abhishek Singh**: Co-Founder & CEO of ATMA-AI. Abhishek Singh is an expert in AI Systems, Full-Stack Architecture, Web Development, and Machine Learning. He graduated from Jawaharlal Nehru University.
- **Avadhesh Kumar**: Co-Founder & CTO of ATMA-AI. Avadhesh Kumar specializes in Machine Learning, Cloud Infrastructure, EdTech, and Neuro-Symbolic AI. He is an alumnus of the Indian Institute of Technology Delhi.
- **Chirag Beniwal**: Co-Founder & CMO of ATMA-AI. Chirag Beniwal leads Enterprise Systems, Data Engineering, and Backend Architecture at the company. He graduated from Jawaharlal Nehru University.

## Services

We offer comprehensive enterprise AI solutions:
- **Custom LLM Deployment**: Training and fine-tuning Large Language Models tailored to enterprise data.
- **Enterprise Architecture**: Designing robust, scalable cloud infrastructure and backend systems.
- **Neuro-Symbolic Robotics**: Advanced AI research bridging symbolic logic and neural networks for real-world robotics.
